faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

q1.question: Is the website really delivered in 6 hours?
q1.answer: Yes. Once we receive your content, our team starts immediately. Most websites are delivered the same day. If we can't meet the deadline, you don't pay.

q2.question: Do I really only pay after delivery?
q2.answer: Yes. You pay 50% upfront to start, and the remaining 50% only after you've seen and approved the final result. If you're not satisfied, we revise it for free.

q3.question: What if I don't like the result?
q3.answer: Every plan includes a free revision round. We'll adjust the design, layout, or content until you're happy. Your satisfaction is guaranteed before final payment.

q4.question: What do I need to provide?
q4.answer: Just fill out a simple form with your business name, logo, text, images, and brand colors. Don't have everything ready? No problem — we can work with what you have.

q5.question: Can I request custom features?
q5.answer: Absolutely. Booking systems, payment processing, contact forms, galleries, multi-language support — tell us what you need and we'll build it in.

q6.question: Is my website secure and reliable?
q6.answer: Yes. Your site runs on the same technology trusted by Apple, Netflix, Spotify, Airbnb, and Porsche. It's fully encrypted, loads instantly worldwide, and has 99.99% uptime.

q7.question: Will my website be fast?
q7.answer: Extremely. We build for performance from the start. Your site will load in under a second — which means better Google rankings and fewer visitors leaving.

q8.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance?
q8.answer: Yes, starting at 19,000 HUF/month for hosting, security updates, and backups. We also offer advanced support at 49,000 HUF/month with priority changes and monitoring.

q9.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q9.answer: Bank transfer and online card payment. Simple, secure, no hassle.
